title: ThaumIchor
description: An addon for the legendary ichor from the 4 taumcraft add-on!
body:
# The legendary ichor from the thaumcraft 4 versions is back!
This mod is a kind of add-on to thaumcraft 6, and a reworking of the old add-on, for the sake of adding ichor and ichor things.
## Mod review
